releasedThisWeek.title: Moana
releasedThisWeek.summary: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

releasedThisWeek.title: Evil Dead Burn
releasedThisWeek.summary: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life - survive even in death.
